title: GEMglAreTexturesResident
description: determine if textures are loaded in texture memory

messages.description: Specifies the number of texture names to be queried.
Specifies an array containing the texture names to be queried.
Returns an array indicating whether each corresponding texture is resident.

arguments.description: Specifies the number of texture names to be queried.
Specifies an array containing the texture names to be queried.
Returns an array indicating whether each corresponding texture is resident.
